result.response_content_preview:
THOUGHT:
Since this is Round 1 and the current citation list is empty, I need to establish a foundational reference that frames the entire workshop paper on real-world deep learning pitfalls. The most critical missing citation is a comprehensive benchmark or survey that systematically documents how models fail under real-world distribution shifts and deployment conditions. This single paper will immediately serve multiple required citation purposes: summarizing existing literature on deployment failures (1), crediting the creators of a widely adopted real-world evaluation dataset (3), highlighting research gaps in standard IID evaluation protocols (5), and supporting core arguments about the lab-to-real performance gap (7).
